nodes.label: AI as quick efficient reference tool
nodes.grounding_span: I do not have to search through different links for the answer. I can speak the question and get a quick response

nodes.label: AI as guidance for appropriate professional conduct with children
nodes.label_negative: Relying on personal or colleagues' potentially inappropriate approaches
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I may ask for ways to help or handle a child when there is conflict. The most appropriate way

nodes.label: AI as reflection and learning tool after interactions
nodes.label_negative: No post-hoc analysis or missed learning opportunity
nodes.grounding_span: I have used it after a situation because i was curious if i did/said the right things

nodes.label: Maintaining own professional judgment and growth
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on external input at expense of personal learning
nodes.grounding_span: I like to have things be a learning experience for me and I like to work through things myself sometimes

nodes.label: Being present and respectful with students
nodes.label_negative: Disrupting interaction by using phone in front of child
nodes.grounding_span: It would be rude if i am talking with a child and then just turn on my phone and start asking questions

nodes.label: Efficiency and time management
nodes.grounding_span: most of the time quick is what i need

nodes.label: Professional competence and appropriate child interaction
nodes.grounding_span: the most appropriate way, since you cannot handle it the same way you many handle things at home

nodes.label: Personal growth and learning
nodes.grounding_span: Its a great learning experience. I would then have new tools i could use

nodes.label: Respectful and attentive student relationships
nodes.grounding_span: It would be rude if i am talking with a child and then just turn on my phone

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for quick answers and reflection
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it is satisfying knowing i took the right approach

nodes.label: Frustration when AI reveals own shortcomings
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes it is frustrating to see where maybe i was lacking

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI in front of students
nodes.grounding_span: It would be rude if i am talking with a child and then just turn on my phone and start asking questions

nodes.label: Openness to continued AI use for new questions
nodes.grounding_span: I think there will always be new questions to ask, so i am sure i would continue to use it

nodes.label: Preemptive preparation — asking questions beforehand to avoid disruption
nodes.grounding_span: That is why there are times i will ask questions preemptively so I can prepare

nodes.label: Reflective post-hoc analysis — using AI to evaluate own performance
nodes.grounding_span: I have used it after a situation because i was curious if i did/said the right things
